Class Answer

java.lang.Object
application.Answer
public class Answer extends Object
Represents an answer to a question in the Q&A system.

  • Constructor Details

    • Answer

      public Answer(int questionId, String content, String answeredBy)
      Constructor to create a new Answer for a question.
      Parameters:
      questionId - ID of the question the answer will be attached to.
      content - String containing the contents of the answer.
      answeredBy - String containing the username of the person posting the answer.

    • Answer

      public Answer(int id, int questionId, String content, String answeredBy, LocalDateTime createdAt, boolean isRead, boolean isFlagged, int upvotes)
      Constructor for loading an Answer from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - ID of the answer.
      questionId - ID of the question the answer is attached to.
      content - String containing the contents of the answer.
      answeredBy - String containing the username of the person posting the answer.
      createdAt - Time and date the answer was created.
      isRead - Boolean of whether the answer is read or not.
      isFlagged - Boolean of whether the answer is flagged or not.
      upvotes - Number of upvotes the answer has received.

  • Method Details

    • validateContent

      public static String validateContent(String content)
      Method to validate the contents of an answer.
      Parameters:
      content - String containing the contents of the answer.
      Returns:
      Answer contents if they are valid.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - If the content is invalid.

      Sets the value of isRead to true.

      Increments the value of upvotes.

      Gets the date and time the answer was created at but formatted.
      Returns:
      createdAt.

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Gets answer details in a formatted form with id, answeredBy, and upvotes.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      String with id, answeredBy, and upvotes.
